description: Free or highly affordable date ideas under $20.

ideas.title: Takeout Taste Test in the Park
ideas.description: Grab $10–15 worth of takeout from 2–3 different spots and do a blind taste test on a blanket in the park. Score each dish and debate your favorites. It's playful, competitive, and delicious all at once.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: low_budget_01] Two cheerful cartoon characters sitting on a picnic blanket in a sunny park, both blindfolded, holding chopsticks and forks mid-taste-test. Colorful takeout containers from different cuisines are spread around them with handwritten score cards beside each one. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Constellation & Compliments Night
ideas.description: Find a dark open field or rooftop, lay out blankets, and use a free stargazing app like SkyView to identify constellations. Every time one person spots a star or constellation, the other has to share a heartfelt compliment. Bring a thermos of hot cocoa to keep things cozy.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: low_budget_02] Two cartoon characters lying on cozy blankets in a dark open field at night, gazing upward at a vast deep-indigo sky. A glowing star-map app floats above them with golden constellation lines. A steaming thermos of hot cocoa sits between them and small heart speech bubbles drift upward. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Local Trail Bingo Hike
ideas.description: Before hitting the trail, create a bingo card together with things to spot — a squirrel, a red flower, a waterfall, someone's funny hat. The first to complete a row wins bragging rights and gets to pick the next date activity. Completely free and surprisingly addictive.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: low_budget_03] Two cartoon characters hiking a sunlit forest trail, one excitedly pointing at a squirrel on a mossy log while holding up a colorful bingo card with several boxes checked. Both wear backpacks and hiking boots. A red flower blooms in the foreground and a distant waterfall peeks through the trees. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Free Museum Day Photo Challenge
ideas.description: Visit a local museum on a free-admission day and challenge each other to recreate famous artworks or find the most obscure exhibit for a themed photo shoot. Share the results over coffee after. Culture, creativity, and laughs — all for free.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: low_budget_04] Two cartoon characters in a bright museum gallery, one striking a dramatic pose mirroring a large famous painting on the wall behind them while the other holds up a phone to photograph the recreation. Bold colorful flat-style paintings fill the white walls and a 'Free Admission Today' banner hangs at the entrance. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Sunrise Coffee Run
ideas.description: Set an early alarm, grab coffees from a drive-through or brew them at home, and drive to a scenic overlook or hilltop to watch the sunrise together. The quiet morning intimacy and spectacular views make this one of the most romantic zero-cost dates possible.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: low_budget_05] Two cartoon characters sitting inside a parked car at a hilltop scenic overlook, each holding a steaming takeaway coffee cup, watching a massive brilliant sunrise paint the horizon in vivid orange, pink, and gold. A sleepy valley of tiny twinkling lights stretches far below. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Library Date & Book Swap
ideas.description: Spend an hour at the local library where each person silently selects a book they think their partner will love. Grab cheap coffees nearby, sit together, and start reading the books — no phones allowed. Swap notes about your picks afterward over a simple picnic.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: low_budget_06] Two cartoon characters sitting across from each other at a wooden library table, each absorbed in a book secretly chosen by the other. Tall stacks of colorful books surround them, a bold 'No Phones Allowed' sign sits between them, and warm reading lamps cast a golden glow over the scene. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Farmers Market Cook-Off
ideas.description: Visit your local farmers market with a $20 budget each and independently choose fresh ingredients for a dish. Head home and cook your creations simultaneously, then taste and score each other's meals. The cook-off format turns grocery shopping into a culinary adventure.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: low_budget_07] Two cartoon characters at a vibrant farmers market produce stall, each clutching an overflowing basket of colorful fresh ingredients — tomatoes, peppers, kale, herbs — and shooting each other a fiercely competitive side-eye. Handwritten price signs and bright flower bundles fill the stall behind them. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Volunteer Together
ideas.description: Sign up for a local volunteering session — a food bank, animal shelter, or park cleanup — and spend a few hours giving back as a team. Studies show couples who volunteer together report higher life satisfaction. The shared purpose creates a genuine emotional connection that's hard to replicate at a restaurant.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: low_budget_08] Two cartoon characters wearing matching volunteer aprons at a bright food bank, smiling broadly as they sort a rainbow of colorful canned goods and produce boxes. Other cheerful cartoon volunteers bustle in the background and a large 'Thank You, Volunteers!' banner hangs on the wall. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Neighborhood Exploration Walk
ideas.description: Pick a neighborhood neither of you has explored before and set a rule — no phones, no destination, just wander. Stop at whatever catches your eye: a mural, a quirky shop window, an old church. The goal is noticing details together and sparking genuine conversation.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: low_budget_09] Two cartoon characters strolling along a vibrant urban sidewalk with no phones in sight, pausing in front of a massive colorful street mural painted across a brick building. Quirky independent storefronts, potted plants, and hanging string lights line the street in warm golden afternoon light. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.

ideas.title: Latte & Doodle Sketch Date
ideas.description: Grab coffees at a café and sit outside with napkins and sugar packets as your only art supplies. Take turns sketching each other's portraits as fast or as carefully as you like. Frame the results — the worse the drawings, the funnier the keepsake.
ideas.image_prompt: [ID: low_budget_10] Two cartoon characters at a sunny outdoor cafe table, each holding up a napkin with a hilariously inaccurate portrait of the other drawn on it. Sugar packets are propped as tiny canvas stands, coffee cups and croissants cover the table, and both characters look delighted by their terrible drawings. A high-quality, vibrant, flat-vector illustration in the iconic Kurzgesagt style. Use a high-saturation color palette with bold, clean lines, flat shapes, and minimal shading. The scene should be whimsical, educational, and polished, featuring charming character designs, expressive poses, and a clean, clutter-free composition. The aesthetic should be modern, professional, and visually engaging, suitable for high-end educational animation.
